scripts.test:position-context-tool-flow: tsc -p tsconfig.tools-tests.json && mkdir -p /tmp/teachess-get-position-context-tests/node_modules/@ && ln -sfn ../../lib /tmp/teachess-get-position-context-tests/node_modules/@/lib && NODE_PATH=./node_modules node --test --test-isolation=none --test-concurrency=1 /tmp/teachess-get-position-context-tests/lib/ai/tools/position-context-tool-flow.test.js /tmp/teachess-get-position-context-tests/app/api/ai/test/tools/position-context/route.test.js
scripts.test:ai-tools: npm run test:get-position-context && npm run test:position-context-tool-flow
